title: CH65 4EQ, Argent Energy Holdings Limited: environmental permit issued – EPR/JP3031RC/V006
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Argent Energy Holdings Limited Installation name: Argent Oil Terminal Permit number: EPR/JP3031RC/V006  "
